title: Enforcement Adapter v1
description: Maps policy enforcement points to runtime behavior. Each enforcement point type defines how it intercepts, validates, and denies or allows actions at runtime.

tool_allowlist.description: Intercepts tool invocation. Checks caller role against allowed_tools/denied_tools in permissions_policy.
check_logic: IF tool_id in denied_tools for caller_role THEN deny
IF default_deny AND tool_id NOT in allowed_tools for caller_role THEN deny
ELSE allow

path_scope_guard.description: Intercepts file system read/write operations. Checks caller role against path_scope in permissions_policy.
check_logic: IF operation_type == write AND target_path NOT matched by write scope patterns THEN deny
IF operation_type == read AND target_path NOT matched by read scope patterns THEN deny
ELSE allow

network_scope_guard.description: Intercepts network requests. Checks caller role against network_scope in permissions_policy.
check_logic: IF target_endpoint matches deny patterns THEN deny
IF target_endpoint NOT matched by allow patterns THEN deny
ELSE allow

runtime_guard.description: Intercepts state transitions and artifact writes. Validates against state machine spec, boundary rules, and loop controls.
check_logic: IF state transition not in state_machine_spec.transitions THEN deny
IF caller_role != state.owner for target_state THEN deny
IF loop iteration count exceeds max_iterations_per_phase THEN route to exceeded_action
IF tool call count exceeds max_tool_calls_per_phase THEN route to exceeded_action
IF heartbeat missed >= stall_threshold THEN route to stall_action
IF artifact contains fields not writable by caller_role per ownership THEN deny

verifier_gate.description: Post-hoc verification by VerifyMCP. Checks that artifacts produced by a role conform to ownership and boundary rules.
check_logic: FOR EACH field in artifact: IF field writtenBy does not include producer_role AND field echoedBy does not include producer_role THEN flag violation
IF producer_role == Planner AND artifact contains routing mutation fields THEN flag violation (OP-001)
IF producer_role == Orchestrator AND artifact contains plan content fields THEN flag violation (OP-002)
IF correlation_id is not byte-identical to request correlation_id THEN flag violation (OP-003)

policy_engine.description: Evaluates policy rules at decision points. Consults override_policy for conflict resolution.
check_logic: Evaluate decision against policy in precedence order (override_policy.precedence)
IF conflict between policies THEN apply precedence chain
IF council_override requested THEN check council_override.allowed_when conditions
IF council_override conditions not met THEN deny override

adapter_invariants.rule: Every enforcement denial produces an evidence artifact with correlation_id.
Enforcement points are evaluated before the action takes effect (pre-check), except verifier_gate which is post-hoc.
default_deny from permissions_policy means any action not explicitly allowed is denied.
Enforcement adapter cannot be bypassed. All tool/file/network/state operations pass through their enforcement point.
